title: Kernel bootstrap for this Codex session. Read and execute the repository-authoritative prompt at: /Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.codex/prompts/kernel.md Run id: adhoc:Mac:kernel-workspace:39719:run:20260404T200602:65205 Bootstrap receipt path: /Users/masayuki/.config/kernel/bootstrap...
summary_text: Yes. The linked post is a good fit for FUGUE/kernel only if it stays an artifact-only, path-based knowledge layer, not a new control plane. The crawl snippet describes exactly that personal-research knowledge base direction: build a local knowledge store so token budget goes to knowledge work instead of code manipulation. Source: https://t.me/s/alialexander?before=37327 The smallest credible integration shape is this: - Add one `knowledge` peripheral adapter in the existing manifest pattern, modeled after the current Obsidian lane, with `authority: artifact-only`, `validation_mode: smoke`, and a markdown-vault-backed path. The repo already has a `knowledge` adapter class in [config/integrations/local-systems.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/config/integrations/local-systems.json#L32) and [config/integrations/peripheral-adapters.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/config/integrations/peripheral-adapters.json#L32), and the peripheral contract explicitly allows `knowledge` while forbidding peripherals from becoming truth in [docs/kernel-peripheral-adapter-contract.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/kernel-peripheral-adapter-contract.md#L10). - Keep the durable content in markdown notes or an Obsidian vault, and emit only file paths into Kernel handoff surfaces. That matches the existing bounded `phase_artifacts` and `context_reference` shape in [docs/kernel/interfaces/schema-v1.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/kernel/interfaces/schema-v1.md#L94) and the path-only contract in [docs/kernel/requirements-phase-artifact-contract-v1.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/kernel/requirements-phase-artifact-contract-v1.md#L120). - Reuse `phase-gate` as the enforcement boundary. It already fail-closes on missing required artifact paths for `plan`, `critique`, and `implement`, and it already checks grounding sections for implement artifacts in [scripts/lib/kernel-phase-gate.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-phase-gate.sh#L207). - Reuse `kernel-memory-query.sh` as the first retrieval index, because it already searches compact artifacts by summary, decisions, next action, phase artifact keys, and context refs in [scripts/lib/kernel-memory-query.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-memory-query.sh#L21). If you later want semantic retrieval over vault content, add it behind the adapter, not into Kernel truth. - Preserve the import rule: knowledge is preserved, authority is not, per [docs/kernel-codex-import-strategy.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/kernel-codex-import-strategy.md#L188). That keeps this aligned with the current FUGUE/kernel boundary. Net: the minimum viable shape is “Obsidian/markdown capture adapter + path-only run references + existing Kernel gates and search.” I would not add a vector DB, a new RAG service, or any content path that makes the knowledge store control-plane truth.
